topStories.description: Trump’s announcement follows his earlier warning that ICE agents would be deployed if lawmakers failed to reach a funding agreement for the Department of Homeland Security (DHS).

topStories.title: Punjab official suicide: Opposition steps up pressure for Laljit Singh Bhullar’s arrest
topStories.description: Congress, BJP, and SAD demand arrest of former AAP minister after warehousing corporation official’s death by suicide

topStories.title: Samsani Srinivasa Rao re-elected as A.P. Government Drivers’ Union president
Middle East Conflict: Israeli PM Netanyahu urges global leaders to join the war with US against Iran
topStories.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu on Sunday (local time) called on the global leaders to join hands with Israel and the US in their war against Iran, citing Tehran's recent attacks on Tel Aviv.

topStories.title: Meteor breaks apart mid-air over Texas, triggers loud booms | Watch
topStories.description: As per the space agency, residents reported seeing the luminous object at around 4:40 p.m. CDT, describing it as a streak racing across the sky. The meteor first became visible at an altitude of roughly 49 miles above Stagecoach, located northwest of Houston.

topStories.title: Dhurandhar 2 Secures Top Spot At US Box Office
topStories.description: Aditya Dhar's Dhurandhar: The Revenge surpassed movies like Hoppers, Reminders of Him, and GOAT on the USA box office list on March 19.

topStories.title: Trump makes good on his 'ICE agents at US airports' threat over funding impasse
topStories.description: Trump makes good on his ICE agents at US airports threat over funding impasse

topStories.title: Modi calls ministerial meeting today to review petroleum, power and fertiliser sectors amid US-Iran war — What we know
topStories.description: PM Narendra Modi will hold a ministerial meeting to discuss the energy situation and status of petroleum, power, and fertiliser sectors, amid the US-Iran war in West Asia. Focus will be on logistics and supply stability.

topStories.title: Fireball Seen Blazing Across Texas Sky As Meteor Explodes Midair
topStories.description: Due to its intense brightness, high velocity, and the subsequent audible sounds, this event successfully captured the public's attention.

topStories.title: US-Israel, Iran conflict: HMS Anson, Britain's nuclear-powered submarine, arrives in the Arabian Sea, says report
topStories.description: HMS Anson, Britain's nuclear-powered submarine has arrived in the northern Arabian Sea as tensions in the Middle East soar. Equipped with Tomahawk missiles, the Royal Navy submarine left a port from Australia's Perth on 6 March, days after the US and Israel launched strikes against Iran

topStories.title: Iran claims it has shot down ‘invading’ US F-15 fighter jet near Hormuz Island: Watch video
topStories.description: Iran claims to have shot down an enemy F-15 fighter jet near Hormuz Island, with investigations ongoing. The US and other Middle Eastern nations have not commented on the situation, while Iranian media has released a video of the incident.

topStories.title: PM Modi chairs high-level energy meet, reviews power readiness as Trump warns attack over Hormuz Strait
topStories.description: Narendra Modi reviewed key energy sectors as crude prices reached $119 high, tensions in West Asia continued to persist.

dailyNews.title: US-operated Patriot missile likely involved in Bahrain blast on March 9 that injured over 30 people
dailyNews.description: A blast in Bahrain's Mahazza, injuring over 30 civilians, may have resulted from a U.S. Patriot missile intercepting an Iranian drone. Analysis suggests the missile detonated mid-air, causing extensive damage, while Bahrain's defenses failed to prevent the Iranian attack on a nearby oil refinery.

dailyNews.title: Iran strikes on US military bases caused $800-mn worth damages in first two weeks of Middle East conflict: Report
dailyNews.description: Iran's military warned of retaliation against US and Israeli energy infrastructure if attacked. Ongoing Middle East conflict has seen Iran targeting US bases, reportedly inflicting $800 million in damages. The US has requested $200 billion for war funding amid rising tensions.

dailyNews.title: Texas parents flood school choice program, far exceeding the initial 90,000 student capacity
dailyNews.description: Texas school choice applications for the Texas Education Freedom Accounts surpassed 241,000, far exceeding the 90,000 spots funded by the program's initial $1 billion investment.

dailyNews.title: Alabama student’s death leads ex-detective to reveal how investigators probe possible drugging cases
dailyNews.description: Authorities have not ruled out drugging after University of Alabama student Jimmy Gracey was found dead in Barcelona's waters near Port Olímpic area.

dailyNews.title: Chicago residents unionize to fight possible displacement, rent hikes over Obama Presidential Center
dailyNews.description: Woodlawn tenants at Chaney Braggs Apartments have formed a union to fight displacement they say is driven by the Obama Presidential Center's arrival.

dailyNews.title: Hotel buffet crashers caught on camera loading up plates, walking out without paying
dailyNews.description: People are helping themselves to free hotel breakfasts without checking in or paying, viral videos show, sparking debate about whether this is considered theft or not.

dailyNews.title: Nick Viall and wife find 'blessing' in 18-year age gap, follow Harrison Ford and Calista Flockhart's lead
dailyNews.description: "Bachelor" star Nick Viall and wife Natalie Joy open up about dealing with online trolls criticizing their 18-year age gap while hosting new Netflix show.

dailyNews.title: Miranda Lambert's childhood home hits market for $1.59M as parents say goodbye to Texas farmhouse
dailyNews.description: Miranda Lambert's childhood home in Lindale, Texas, hits the market for $1.59 million. The country star lived here from age 14-21 during her formative years.

dailyNews.title: JONATHAN TURLEY: Afroman turns court into First Amendment rap lesson on rights
dailyNews.description: Joseph E. Foreman, known as Afroman, used rap songs and security footage to mock Ohio officers who raided his home, then beat their lawsuit in court.

dailyNews.title: The real reasons you’re still exhausted after 8 hours of sleep, according to an expert
dailyNews.description: Still tired after 8 hours of sleep? An expert reveals why quality matters more than quantity, plus tips to improve your rest and wake up refreshed.

dailyNews.title: Ethan Hawke’s advice on unrequited love goes viral, resonates with millions
dailyNews.description: Ethan Hawke's unrequited love advice from the Academy Awards red carpet has gone viral, with fans calling it "insanely beautiful" after his "Blue Moon" Best Actor nomination.

dailyNews.title: Trump says ICE will deploy to airports Monday to assist TSA amid funding standoff
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump will deploy ICE agents to airports across the country on Monday in support of TSA agents amid a funding battle with Democrats.

topStories.title: Trump Is Finally Eyeing an Exit From Iran. But Will He Take It?
topStories.description: President Trump says he is considering “winding down” operations in Iran. But many of his original war goals remain unaccomplished.

topStories.title: ICE to Augment Security at Airports Amid Partial Shutdown, Border Czar Says
topStories.description: Tom Homan, President Trump’s chief border official, said plans were being drawn up to send immigration and customs agents to U.S. airports.

topStories.title: Mullin Explored Bipartisan Deal to Rein in Immigration Crackdown
topStories.description: The G.O.P. senator President Trump chose to lead the Department of Homeland Security privately discussed concessions the White House has repeatedly rejected.

topStories.description: A Minnesota church protest made the former anchor a star again — and a target for the Trump administration.

topStories.title: Trump Has Made a Fundamental Miscalculation about Iran
topStories.description: America shouldn’t fight a war like this.

topStories.title: Trump says ICE agents will assist TSA at airports as delays worsen
topStories.description: Wait times aren't expected to improve until government funding is restored and TSA officers receive paychecks.

topStories.title: Iran warns of "irreversible damage" to region after Trump attack threat
topStories.description: President Trump's threat comes after CENTCOM's commander said that Iran's ability to threaten the Strait of Hormuz had been "degraded."

dailyNews.description: President Trump's threat comes after CENTCOM's commander said that Iran's ability to threaten the Strait of Hormuz had been "degraded."

dailyNews.title: Cory Booker: "We, the people, are the heroes this country needs"
dailyNews.description: The New Jersey Senator has been a face of the Democratic Party's resistance to the Trump administration. He expresses his hopes for our nation in a new book, "Stand," in which he encourages Americans to stand together, reminding us of our shared virtues.

dailyNews.title: In conversation with Cory Booker
dailyNews.description: New Jersey Senator Cory Booker has been a face of the Democratic Party's resistance to the Trump administration – from a record-breaking filibuster critical of the president's policies, to calls for accountability over U.S. involvement in the war with Iran. He also expresses his hopes for our nation in a new book, "Stand," in which he encourages Americans to stand together, reminding us of our shared virtues. He talks with Faith Salie about a political career forged in Newark, N.J. ("the toughest place in politics ever"), and how it is time to "seize, reclaim, and redeem the dream of America."

dailyNews.title: The prospects for "boots on the ground" to seize Iran's enriched uranium
dailyNews.description: As the war with Iran enters its fourth week, much of its stockpile of enriched uranium is believed to lie buried deep inside the Isfahan Mountain complex. CBS News national security correspondent David Martin talks with physicist David Albright, president of the Institute for Science and International Security, about the risks of seizing that near-weapon grade material.

dailyNews.title: Signs of the times: Removing stories of America's past from our national parks
dailyNews.description: Following an executive order from President Trump, the Department of the Interior has removed dozens of educational signs at our national parks that the administration claims promote "divisive narratives" and "corrosive ideology."

dailyNews.title: Scott Bessent defends U.S. military actions in Iran: 'Sometimes you have to escalate to de-escalate'
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent discusses the Trump Administration’s decision to remove sanctions on Iranian oil and talks about the cost of war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Cuban deputy FM reacts to Trump’s threats to take over Cuba: Full interview
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Cuban Deputy Foreign Minister Carlos Fernández de Cossío says “our military is always prepared” but “we don't pose any threat to the United States” after President Trump threatened a U.S. takeover of Cuba.

dailyNews.title: Flyers react to Trump’s plan for federal immigration agents
dailyNews.description: Flyers at Newark Liberty International Airport in Newark, N.J., had mixed reactions to President Donald Trump's plan to send federal immigration agents to airports amid the Department of Homeland Security shutdown. Lawmakers on Capitol Hill have been working through the weekend to fund TSA and alleviate staff squeezes, but a bill has not been passed yet. NBC New York’s Charles Watson reports.

dailyNews.title: Iran refuses to back down after Trump issues 48-hour deadline over Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Tehran has threatened to escalate strikes on energy infrastructure and target critical water desalination facilities should President Donald Trump make good on a promise to “obliterate” the country’s power plants if it does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz

dailyNews.title: Museum sues Trump administration alleging it canceled grant on basis of race
dailyNews.description: An Underground Railroad museum in upstate New York alleged in a lawsuit Friday that the Trump administration unlawfully terminated its federal grant on the basis of race, pointing to President Donald Trump’s efforts to dismantle diversity-focused initiatives

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens attack on Iran power plants if Strait of Hormuz isn't reopened
dailyNews.description: Iran and Israel traded attacks on Saturday as the war in the Middle East escalated into a dangerous new direction at the start of its fourth week.

dailyNews.title: Analysis: Trump's unshackled presidency puts him at the center of the economy
dailyNews.description: The president's unprecedented use of executive power has made him a driving force behind oil prices, the Federal Reserve's interest rates and more.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  US getting close to meeting objectives in Iran, Trump says
dailyNews.description: President Trump said he's considering "winding down" military efforts in the Middle East amid the ongoing war in Iran.
